Fortunately, we are still tracking a solid $70 price drop on AirPods Pro 3 to deliver one of the best deals ever, as well as up to $150 off the most affordable and popular Apple Watch Series 11 models. Apple has raised the price on its current generation MacBook lineup substantially (as much as $500) but there are still some models down with Prime Day pricing at as much as much $850 under the price you’ll pay Apple (if you move fast, they are disappearing every minute). All of that and a bunch more awaits below as part of our last minute Apple Prime Day deals collection.
